title: 'Ashdowd #0795
definition:
Ashdod = "powerful"

 1) a major Philistine city on the Mediterranean Sea west from
    Jerusalem, modern Esdud
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ashdod = "powerful"

 1) a major Philistine city on the Mediterranean Sea west from
    Jerusalem, modern Esdud

    NASB:  a city of the Philistines
